productDisplayName: Puma Men's Jago White Silver Navy Shoe
description: Bring back the joy in running with these Jago IV shoes from puma, featuring DuoCell technology. With sleek good looks and high-tech performance, these shoes look great on the tracks and in urban settings.Upper Synthetic leather upper for durable protection Formstripe on the sides for extra comfort and added structure Appliqued cat logo on the tongue to create a style statement Embroidered cat logo on the toe box for added fashion Lace-ups for snug Fit Textile lining for extra comfort Midsole Phylon midsole for maximum comfort and support Cushioned collar and tongue for plush comfort     Outsole DuoCELL technology with cell cushioning units relocated from the external midsole to the outsole so that each cell absorbs shock independently and reacts individually Sole in multi-directional pattern for superior grip
